# National Transmission

> Premium remanufactured transmissions, engines, and auto repair in Alexandria, LA. Backed by a 3-Year Nationwide Unlimited Mileage Warranty.

## About the Company

National Transmission is a premier automotive repair and remanufacturing facility based in Alexandria, Louisiana. We specialize in remanufacturing transmissions beyond factory specifications, general auto repair, suspension services, and exhaust/catalytic converter repairs. All our remanufactured units come with a 3-Year Nationwide Unlimited Mileage Warranty.

## Contact Information
- **Phone:** (318) 445-2244
- **Email:** nationaltransmission1521@gmail.com
- **Address:** 1521 MacArthur Dr., Alexandria, LA
- **Hours:** Mon–Fri 8am–5pm

## Navigation & Pages

- [Home](https://nattransmission.com/) - Overview of our premium remanufactured transmissions, engine repair, auto repair, and 3-Year Warranty.
- [Remanned vs Rebuild](https://nattransmission.com/remanned) - Understanding the difference between rebuilding and our remanufacturing standard.
- [Warranty](https://nattransmission.com/warranty) - Details of our 3-Year Nationwide Unlimited Mileage Warranty.
- [Contact](https://nattransmission.com/contact) - Contact form and location details for our shop.

## Services Directory

We specialize in the following automotive engineering and repair services:

### Core Services
- [Remanufactured Transmissions](https://nattransmission.com/transmission) - Expert 1-3 day turnaround, built beyond factory spec.
- [Catalytic Converters & Exhaust](https://nattransmission.com/exhaust) - Replacement, leak repair, mufflers, and O2 sensors.
- [Front End & Suspension](https://nattransmission.com/suspension) - Steering, alignment, and full suspension care.
- [Brake Inspection & Repair](https://nattransmission.com/brakes) - Complete brake inspection, pads, rotors, and fluid.
- [General Auto Repair](https://nattransmission.com/general-repair) - Complete auto care including diagnostics, AC, heating, oil changes, batteries, etc.

### Front End & Suspension Sub-services
- [Tie Rod Replacement](https://nattransmission.com/suspension-tie-rod) - Precise steering starts with solid tie rods.
- [Ball Joint Replacement](https://nattransmission.com/suspension-ball-joints) - Keep your wheels connected and your ride smooth.
- [Strut & Shock Replacement](https://nattransmission.com/suspension-struts) - Smooth rides depend on healthy struts and shocks.
- [Control Arm Service](https://nattransmission.com/suspension-control-arms) - Handling integrity with control arm and bushing replacements.
- [Wheel Alignment Service](https://nattransmission.com/suspension-wheel-alignment) - Straight tracking, even tire wear, and better fuel economy.
- [Wheel Bearing Replacement](https://nattransmission.com/suspension-wheel-bearings) - Diagnose and replace grinding wheel bearings.
- [Power Steering Repair](https://nattransmission.com/suspension-power-steering) - Pumps, racks, lines, and fluids for hydraulic and electric steering.
- [CV Axle Replacement](https://nattransmission.com/suspension-cv-axle) - CV axles and boots replaced to restore drivetrain integrity.
- [Sway Bar Link Replacement](https://nattransmission.com/suspension-sway-bar) - Reduce body roll and restore stability.

### General Auto Repair Sub-services
- [Vehicle Diagnostics](https://nattransmission.com/repair-diagnostics) - Pinpoint root causes with state-of-the-art diagnostic tools.
- [Auto AC Repair & Recharge](https://nattransmission.com/repair-ac) - AC diagnostics, recharge, compressor and leak repair.
- [Heating System Repair](https://nattransmission.com/repair-heating) - Heater cores, thermostats, blower motors, and coolant system.
- [Full Brake Service](https://nattransmission.com/repair-brakes-full) - Comprehensive pads, rotors, fluid, lines, and master cylinder.
- [Oil Change Service](https://nattransmission.com/repair-oil-change) - Engine longevity oil change with multi-point inspection.
- [Car Battery Replacement](https://nattransmission.com/repair-battery) - Testing, diagnostics, and replacement of standard and AGM batteries.
- [Alternator Repair & Replacement](https://nattransmission.com/repair-alternator) - Testing and replacement of electrical system alternators.
- [Starter Replacement](https://nattransmission.com/repair-starter) - Solve engine no-start issues with quality starter motors.
- [Radiator Flush & Repair](https://nattransmission.com/repair-radiator) - Prevent engine overheating with flushes, radiators, and hoses.
- [Fuel System Service](https://nattransmission.com/repair-fuel-system) - Injectors, filters, pressure testing, and throttle body.
- [Timing Belt Replacement](https://nattransmission.com/repair-timing-belt) - Crucial belt replacement to prevent catastrophic engine damage.
- [Truck Repair & Service](https://nattransmission.com/repair-truck-service) - Tailored transmission, suspension, and engine repairs for trucks.

### Catalytic Converter & Exhaust Sub-services
- [Catalytic Converter Replacement](https://nattransmission.com/catalytic-replacement) - OEM-quality and CARB-compliant catalytic converter replacement.
- [Catalytic Converter Repair](https://nattransmission.com/catalytic-repair) - Related diagnostic repairs (O2 sensors, misfires, leaks).
- [Exhaust Leak Repair](https://nattransmission.com/exhaust-leak-repair) - Pinpoint and fix toxic leaks at manifolds, flex pipes, and flanges.
- [Muffler Service & Repair](https://nattransmission.com/muffler-service) - Quiet exhaust and restore proper flow.
- [O2 Sensor Replacement](https://nattransmission.com/o2-sensor) - Maintain fuel efficiency with OEM-spec oxygen sensors.
